title: clitoria javitensis var. grandifolia
intro: Clitoria javitensis var. grandifolia, also known as Butterfly Pea, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions, particularly in Central and South America. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antidiabetic properties, which are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Clitoria javitensis var. grandifolia include its potential to reduce blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit neuroprotective effects. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including diabetes, hypertension, and anxiety.
